title: RPG Dice
description: Create your tabletop RPG in Minecraft using this dice kit
body:
Have you always wanted to make your own RPG campaign? Are the apps to create your board too expensive? So an excellent option would be to create in Minecraft. Express your creativity by creating your own campaign in this game we love.

And this mod serves to help you with this objective, adding various data often used in campaigns, just click with the right button and make the magic happen.

This mod contains the following dice: d4, d6, d8, d10, d12, d16 and d20. IMPORTANT MESSAGE: Some dice may have a bug where it is necessary to press more than once to receive the number.







Check out my other projects!
